name: Bonusly
tagline: AI-driven employee recognition and rewards platform
description: Bonusly is an employee recognition and rewards platform that uses AI to surface engagement insights and foster a culture of appreciation. Employees give each other micro-bonuses tied to company values, which can be redeemed for gift cards, donations, or custom rewards. Bonusly's AI analytics identify recognition patterns, flag disengaged teams, and provide managers with actionable insights to improve retention and morale.
cons: Can feel gamified if not managed well
